steps.t: Some of your companions at Ilzag Khûl in Urash Dâr have begun to devise plans for combatting the Thardúth and the Elder Orcs that serve them.
Rothog asked you to defeat Orcs throughout Urash Dâr. Glorfindel asked you to collect jackal teeth and craban claws from creatures throughout Urash Dâ…
Glorfindel is at Ilzag Khûl in Urash Dâr.
Rothog is at Ilzag Khûl in Urash Dâr.
Khôltekh is at Ilzag Khûl in Urash Dâr.
Rahâzi is at Ilzag Khûl in Urash Dâr.
